summary: Iteration 101 - Quick Actions Panel + Industry Language Utility. All backend APIs and frontend features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Signup.tsx correctly implements 2-step flow with industry selection (PHOTOGRAPHY, DESIGN, FINE_ART)
Backend auth.ts correctly stores industry field on signup and returns it on login/me
industryLanguage.ts provides comprehensive language mapping for all 3 industries
QuickActions.tsx correctly implements all 4 contextual actions with proper handlers
Dashboard.tsx correctly integrates QuickActions in right sidebar below Activity Feed
Industry language correctly applied to stat cards (Total Inquiries, New Inquiries for Photography)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 101 complete. Quick Actions Panel and Industry Language Utility fully working. All 4 quick actions functional: Send a quote (opens lead detail with quotes tab), Follow up on stale leads (switches to list view), Check today's schedule (switches to calendar view), Add a lead (opens add lead modal). 2-step signup with industry selection working correctly.

Backend_Signup_With_Industry.details: POST /api/auth/signup accepts industry field (PHOTOGRAPHY, DESIGN, FINE_ART) and stores it correctly. Defaults to PHOTOGRAPHY if not provided.

Backend_Login_Returns_Industry.details: POST /api/auth/login returns industry field in user object

Backend_Me_Returns_Industry_Fields.details: GET /api/auth/me returns industry, businessName, speciality fields

Backend_Activities_Recent.details: GET /api/activities/recent returns activities data with proper structure

Signup_Step1_Form.details: Form renders with firstname, lastname, email, password fields and Continue button. All data-testid attributes present.

Signup_Step2_Industry_Cards.details: After filling step 1 and clicking Continue, shows 3 industry selection cards (Photography, Design, Fine Art)

Signup_Step2_Submit_Disabled.details: Submit button disabled until an industry card is selected

Signup_Step2_Card_Selection.details: Selecting a card highlights it with colored border and checkmark

Signup_Step2_Back_Button.details: Back button returns to step 1 with data preserved (firstname, lastname, email)

Dashboard_Industry_Language_Topbar.details: Topbar shows industry-specific language ('+ New Inquiry' for Photography)

Dashboard_Industry_Language_Stats.details: Stat cards show 'Total Inquiries' and 'New Inquiries' for Photography

Dashboard_Quick_Actions_Panel.details: Quick Actions panel renders in right sidebar below Activity Feed with all 4 actions

Quick_Action_Send_Quote.details: Opens lead detail modal with quotes tab for lead with no quote

Quick_Action_Follow_Up.details: Switches to list view (stale filter applied when stale leads exist)

Quick_Action_Add_Lead.details: Opens new lead modal (same as topbar button)

Activity_Feed_Card.details: Activity Feed card present in right sidebar with recent activities

Existing_Features_Kanban.details: Kanban view working with leads displayed in columns

Existing_Features_List.details: List view working with leads in table format
